title: reAlpha Appoints Jorge Aldecoa as President
text: DUBLIN, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--reAlpha, an AI-powered real estate technology and investment company with a goal to empower everyone with the ability to invest in the $1.2 trillion global short-term rental market, is pleased to announce the appointment of veteran real estate investor and operator Jorge Aldecoa as President of reAlpha Asset Management Inc (DBA reAlpha Homes). This strategic hire strengthens reAlpha's executive leadership team as the company looks to accelerate its investment acti

title: Building A Rental Housing Empire With Invitation Homes
text: I'm starting this article by highlighting why large investors are increasingly buying single-family homes. One of the best ways to copy large investors is by buying Invitation Homes, a top-quality REIT with great assets and a solid customer base.

title: Invitation Homes Strengthens ESG Commitment
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) (“Invitation Homes” or the “Company”) continues to expand on its environmental, social and governance (“ESG”) efforts. As part of its commitments to advance innovation, ensure that its products and processes are sustainable, and provide transparency in its reporting, the Company has hired professional in-house expertise to expand and deepen its approach to ESG matters. title: Invitation Homes And The U.S. Housing Market: What Is Going On?
text: Real household income continues to decline for the second quarter in a row amid the slowdown in economic activity. Following the income decline, consumers are becoming cautious about buying durable goods.

title: Penn National dropped from S&P 500 for one of America's largest institutional landlords
text: The S&P 500 index will ditch part of its bet on sports gambling in favor of a different business: renting houses.

title: CoStar Group, Invitation Homes Set to Join S&P 500; Others to Join S&P 100, S&P MidCap 400, and S&P SmallCap 600
text: NEW YORK , Sept. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- S&P Dow Jones Indices ("S&P DJI") will make the following changes to the S&P 100, S&P 500, S&P MidCap 400 and S&P SmallCap 600 indices effective prior to the open of trading on Monday, September 19 to coincide with the quarterly rebalance: Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (NASD:AMD) will replace DuPont de Nemours Inc. (NYSE:DD) in the S&P 100.
